goal_text:
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'tuesday'.
The train should 'arrive by 19:30' and should go to 'stansted airport'.
Make sure you get 'train ID'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on tuesday
The train should arrive by 19:30 and should go to stansted airport
Make sure you get train ID
